title: Chef Aid Large Red Poly Chopping Board, Multipurpose Anti-Slip Surface, Easy Clean and Dishwasher Safe with Handle, 40 x 30cm Other Colour Options Available.
features: FOOD-GRADE CHOPPING BOARD: This Chef Aid chopping board is made with highly durable food grade plastic. The material is knife friendly and will not blunt the blades.
ROBUST & NON-SLIP: With a Non-slip design these Chopping boards will not slide or slip during use. They are also Dishwasher safe so easy to clean.

COLOUR-CODED SELECTION: this chopping board can be used as part of a range to separate food preparation of meats, fish, vegetables, and fruits, helping to prevent cross-contamination between different ingredients
